info.name: FMLD MEMS API (v1)
info.description:
Complete API collection for the **mems** project — the FMLD Monitoring & Evaluation (M&E) backend (Laravel 11 · JWT auth). Base host is served at `fmld.olimageserver.com`.

All versioned routes are prefixed with `/api/v1`. Auth is JWT via `tymon/jwt-auth` (middleware `jwt.verify`, or the `auth:api` guard). The one session-authenticated route (`/api/dashboard/stats`) lives outside the v1 group.

## Getting started
1. Select the **FMLD MEMS** environment.
2. Run **Auth › Sign In** — a test script stores `token` and `refresh_token` automatically.
3. Every other request inherits Bearer `{{token}}` from the collection.

Sample responses are attached to each request under the **Examples** tab.

request.description: Authenticate with email + password. Returns a JWT `token`, a `refresh_token`, and the user's roles/permissions.
Return the authenticated user's profile + permission keys. Lets the frontend refresh permissions on reload without re-login. Requires `jwt.verify`.
Invalidate the current JWT. Requires `jwt.verify` and `email.verify`.
Fetch the authenticated user's full record. Requires `jwt.verify`.

item.name: Locations
item.description: Geography reference data — Zone → State → LGA. Public (no auth).

request.description: List all geopolitical zones.

response.name: 200 — Zones fetched

request.description: List states within a zone. `zone_id` is required.
List LGAs within a state. `state_id` is required.

item.name: Programs
item.description: Result-chain reference data — indicators, modules, sectoral goals. Public (no auth).

request.description: All result-chain indicators (impact / outcome / output / bond), unioned and keyed by code.

response.name: 200 — Indicators

request.description: List programme modules.

response.name: 200 — Modules

request.description: List sectoral goals.

response.name: 200 — Sectoral goals

request.description: Top-level departments with all nested descendants.

response.name: 200 — Departments

request.description: Paginated list of indicator form submissions.

query.description: Optional. Filter by indicator type label (Impact / Outcome / Output).

request.description: Collectable indicator fields, keyed by each indicator's globally-unique code. Optional `type` filter.

response.name: 200 — Fields

request.description: Store indicator value submissions. Payload keys are result-chain indicator codes with numeric values.

response.name: 201 — Submitted

request.description: Submit a field enumeration record. `form_type` must be a valid EnumerationRecord::FORM_TYPES value; `zone_id`/`state_id`/`lga_id` must exist. Requires `jwt.verify`.

item.name: Indicator Reporting
item.description: The indicator reporting & approval workflow (JWT). Reports move through review stages via the approval workflow.

request.description: List approval workflows with stages and departments. Requires `manage-approval-workflows`.

response.name: 200 — Workflows

request.description: Create an approval workflow with stages. Requires `manage-approval-workflows`.
Show a workflow with its stages, stage users, and departments.

response.name: 200 — Workflow

request.description: Update a workflow.
Delete a workflow.
Assign departments to a workflow.
Paginated indicator reports. Non-admins without `view-all-indicator-reports` see only their own.
Create a draft report. `indicator_type` is the fully-qualified model class. Requires `report-indicator-data`.
Show a report with values, proofs, approvals, current stage, period and department.

response.name: 200 — Report
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "data": {
        "id": 101,
        "indicator_code": "OPT-7",
        "status": "pending",
        "target_value": 2000,
        "actual_value": 1500,
        "narrative": "Vaccination campaign progressing on schedule.",
        "values": [{ "id": 1, "disagregation_item_id": 11, "value": 800 }],
        "proofs": [{ "id": 5, "file_path": "proofs/opt7-evidence.pdf" }],
        "approvals": [],
        "current_stage": { "id": 1, "name": "Departmental Review" },
        "period": { "id": 4, "name": "Q3 2026" },
        "department": { "id": 3, "name": "Animal Health Division" }
    }
}

request.description: Update a draft/returned report (owner or admin only).
Submit a draft/returned report into the approval workflow.
Attach a proof file to a draft/returned report. Max 10 MB.
Remove a proof from a draft/returned report.
Approve the current stage of a report. Requires `review-indicator-reports` or `approve-indicator-reports`.
Return a report to the reporter. `reason` is required (min 3 chars).
Full approval/audit trail for one report.
Cross-report approval trail. Requires `view-all-indicator-reports`.
List reporting periods, newest first.
Create a reporting period. Requires `manage-reporting-periods`.
Update a reporting period (e.g. close it).
Delete a reporting period.
All public settings. Requires `manage-settings`.
Update settings (key/value map). Requires `manage-settings`.

item.name: Indicator Data (external)
item.description: Read-only approved indicator data for external integrations.

request.description: Paginated approved reports, filterable by indicator code, department, period, or year.
All approved reports for one indicator code, ordered by reporting period (time series).
All supervisor–enumerator relationships.
Assign one or more enumerators to a supervisor. NOTE: this action returns a redirect-back (session flash) rather than JSON — it is primarily driven by the Inertia web UI.
Unassign an enumerator from a supervisor. Returns redirect-back (session flash).
List the enumerators assigned to one supervisor.
Bond deliverables with per-deliverable status rollups and indicator performance.
List of sector goals (id, slug, code, title).
Impact indicators with baselines for the sector dashboard's Impact section.
One goal's outcome + output indicators (id must be numeric).

response.name: 200 — Trends

request.description: NLGAS pillars and their programs, with owner, finances, coverage and finance-derived status.

response.name: 200 — Strategic programs

request.description: Status bucket counts (on-track / at-risk / off-track) from the latest report per indicator.
Up to 10 attention items for off-track indicators.

response.name: 200 — Alerts

request.description: Per-indicator-type Above/On/Below % breakdown.
Headline data-health metric cards from real counts.

response.name: 200 — Metrics

request.description: Validator statuses. Not modelled yet — returns an empty array.
50 most recent activity-log entries, dashboard-shaped.
Indicator reports shaped for the Reporting Obligation table (Due tab).

response.name: 200 — Obligations
response.body:
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Success",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 101,
            "indicator": "Number of animals vaccinated",
            "reportingUnit": "Animal Health Division",
            "type": "Output Indicator (OPT)",
            "period": "Q3 2026",
            "reportingCompletion": 75,
            "status": "Pending Validation",
            "submitted": true,
            "overdue": false
        }
    ]
}

request.description: Returned/rejected reports shaped for the Suppressed tab.

response.name: 200 — Suppressed

request.description: Result-chain indicators grouped by level (impact / outcomes / outputs).

response.name: 200 — Result chain

request.description: SG_DATA-shaped time series keyed by the 8 dashboard sector names, each with monthly + quarterly series.

response.name: 200 — Trends

request.description: PILLAR_PROGRAMS matrix for the Nigeria map: { [pillarTitle]: { [stateName]: { active, programs[], output } } }.

response.name: 200 — Map

request.description: Submitted reports (max 50) shaped for the Data Validation Pipeline table.

response.name: 200 — Pipeline

request.description: Paginated activity logs with rich filters.
The authenticated user's own activity.
Aggregated activity statistics (by method, db action, callable type, status, unique users, recent).
A single activity log with user + callable.

response.name: 404 — Not found

query.description: Delete logs older than N days (default 90).

request.description: Delete activity logs older than `days` (default 90).

response.name: 200 — Cleaned up

item.name: Dashboard (Session Auth)
item.description: Session-authenticated dashboard route — NOT under /api/v1. Uses cookie session (`api.session.auth`), so it will not work with the Bearer token; use a browser session cookie instead.

request.description: Admin dashboard stat cards. Requires a valid session cookie (`api.session.auth`), not the JWT bearer token.

response.name: 200 — Stats
